message.content:
I have successfully found and fixed all 15 bugs across 5 categories:

**Type Errors (3 bugs fixed):**
1. src/modules/analytics/rpjhlr-339.ts - Removed unnecessary parseFloat(String()) coercion
2. src/modules/reporting/htspwx-394.ts - Removed unnecessary parseFloat(String()) coercion
3. src/modules/reporting/mooicv-41.ts - Removed unnecessary parseFloat(String()) coercion

**Null Reference Errors (3 bugs fixed):**
4. src/modules/integrations/gcp/zxwlpa-7.ts - Added optional chaining for config access
5. src/modules/integrations/github/tqkihc-6.ts - Added optional chaining for config access
6. src/modules/reporting/oyhchg-328.ts - Added optional chaining for config access

**Off-by-One Errors (3 bugs fixed):**
7. src/modules/shipping/scpexr-366.ts - Changed <= to < in loop condition
8. src/modules/inventory/xdqcha-338.ts - Changed <= to < in loop condition
9. src/modules/integrations/azure/iikhgd-17.ts - Changed <= to < in loop condition

**Config Errors (3 bugs fixed):**
10. config/environments/production/database.json - Set pool max from 0 to 50
11. config/environments/production/cache.json - Set retryDelayMs from -1 to 100
12. config/environments/production/api-gateway.json - Set maxAge from -86400 to 86400

**Logic Errors (3 bugs fixed):**
13. src/modules/billing/nxpita-32.ts - Changed || to && in negated admin check
14. src/modules/reporting/hftjvf-119.ts - Swapped inverted discount tier values
15. src/modules/shipping/vvfmac-51.ts - Fixed inverted date comparison operator

All 15 bugs have been verified as fixed through search sweeps confirming no buggy patterns remain.
